infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CrimeWatch PNG needs camera access to capture photo and video evidence of incidents.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: CrimeWatch PNG needs microphone access to record audio with video evidence.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: CrimeWatch PNG needs your location to tag evidence with precise coordinates.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: CrimeWatch PNG needs photo library access to save captured evidence.

plugins.cameraPermission: CrimeWatch PNG needs camera access to capture photo and video evidence of incidents.
plugins.microphonePermission: CrimeWatch PNG needs microphone access to record audio with video evidence.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: CrimeWatch PNG needs your location to tag evidence with precise coordinates.

plugins.photosPermission: CrimeWatch PNG needs photo library access to save captured evidence.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: CrimeWatch PNG needs permission to save evidence photos to your device.
